puzzle.hint: A verse about the difference between believers who recognize truth and arrogant disbelievers, emphasizing following the Messenger's way.
puzzle.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُوفُونَ بِعَهْدِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا يَنقُضُونَ ٱلْمِيثَـٰقَ
puzzle.verseEn: Those who fulfill the covenant of Allāh and do not break the contract,
